description: VERIFIED LIVE: the Hugging Face Hub public API — search models and datasets and read model metadata. No token needed (public read; whoami/private repos would need an access token). Tested live by Claude Code: models and datasets search both returned 200 with real data.

tools.name: hf_search_models
tools.description: Search models on the Hugging Face Hub. VERIFIED.

params.name: filter
params.description: e.g. a task tag like text-generation.

tools.name: hf_search_datasets
tools.description: Search datasets on the Hugging Face Hub. VERIFIED.

tools.name: hf_model
tools.description: Full metadata for a model by id (e.g. meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct). VERIFIED.
